title: September 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 6''' is the 249th day of the year (250th in leap years). There are 116 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Sergio Aragonés]] is born.
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Dan Cragg]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Keone Young]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Edita Brychta]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Jason Court]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Tony DiTerlizzi]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Kyle Rowling]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Robin Atkin Downes]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Bertie Carvel]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 31|''Star Wars Weekly'' 31]] published.
*[[1989]] – [[Hannah John-Kamen]] is born.
*[[2000]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 1|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 1]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Heir to the Empire|''Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition'']] released featuring the new novella ''[[Crisis of Faith]]''.
*[[2013]] – [[A. C. Crispin]] dies.
*2013 – ''[[Beyond the Rim]]'' released.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Everything I Need to Know I Learned From a Star Wars Little Golden Book]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Insider 168|''Star Wars Insider'' 168]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 5|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 5]] published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One Adaptation 6|''Rogue One Adaptation'' 6]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 1|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 1]] published.
*2017 – [[Captain Phasma 1|''Captain Phasma'' 1]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: A Junior Novel]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2021]] – [[Michael Kenneth Williams]] dies.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 7]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: Grogu and Mando]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Exploring Tatooine]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Dark Droids 2|''Dark Droids'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 38|''Star Wars'' (2020) 38]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Battle for the Band / Uprooted]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
